summary: Iteration 12 - Krexion NativeShell + feature-gating regression. Backend: 28/28 pytest cases pass (12 feature-flags × disable→403 + enable→non-403, plus 3 smoke + 1 restore). Frontend: NativeShell renders correctly with all 15 required data-testids, engine pill removed from topbar, sidebar groups (Main/Traffic Engine/Tools/CPI/System) all present, ?ui=native gate works, /admin route is NOT wrapped in NativeShell even with ?ui=native, admin login works, user menu Logout exposed, sidebar correctly hides features when admin disables them (verified: features.links=false → Links nav hidden; features.cpi=false → entire CPI section hidden). 0 page errors. Test user features restored to all-true at end of run.

minor.issue: Endpoint is NOT gated by check_user_feature(user,'ua_generator'). Returns 200 even when feature is disabled. Review request item explicitly lists this endpoint as gated (server.py:10954,10976), but only /user-agents/check and /user-agents/generate (POSTs) actually call check_user_feature. The GET /options is what populates the UA Generator picker UI — disabled users could still load picker options. Consider adding check_user_feature at line 10722.

Pydantic body validation (422) runs BEFORE check_user_feature, so a disabled user sending an invalid payload gets 422 instead of 403. Not a security issue (gating still works with valid payloads), but the error surface leaks 'feature unavailable' vs 'bad request' inconsistently to UI.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Gate GET /api/user-agents/options with check_user_feature(user,'ua_generator') at server.py:10722 for consistency with /check and /generate. Currently the picker options leak to disabled users (low severity — no data leakage, only UI dropdown contents).
critical_code_review_comments: NativeShell.js: engine pill correctly removed per spec (line ~337-339 has comment-only block). engineStatus state still tracked for System Health page — clean separation, no dead UI.

CustomerLayout.js / ModeContext.js: ?ui=native + localStorage flag + KREXION_MODE all OR'd together — gives three orthogonal activation paths. Cloud preview default (no flag) renders DashboardLayout untouched ✓.
App.js: AdminRoute wrapper is OUTSIDE CustomerLayout so admin pages can never be wrapped in NativeShell. Verified empirically at /admin?ui=native.

NativeShell sidebar feature-filter logic uses LEGACY_IMPORT_GROUP fallback (email_checker, separate_data, ua_generator etc. inherit from import_data=true if undefined) — matches DashboardLayout 1:1, no behavioral drift between layouts.
Backend check_user_feature() correctly respects explicit False per E1's bug-fix (was auto-granting before) — verified across 12 features.
cpi_module.py uses a single FEATURE_KEY constant + _check_user_feature dependency — clean, no per-route duplication.

Order-of-execution gotcha: in FastAPI, body parsing happens before route function, so check_user_feature() returns 403 only if payload schema-validates. Endpoints with file uploads (multipart) and POSTs with required fields will return 422 for empty body of disabled user. Low-impact since real UI sends valid payloads.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all native-shell, engine-pill-removed, admin-route-not-wrapped, sidebar-feature-hide, logout, navigation checks pass)

test_credentials: Admin: admin@krexion.local / admin123 at POST /api/admin/login (NOT /api/auth/login - that returns 401). Customer: test@krexion.local / test1234 at /api/auth/login (user_id 6a0402d8-aa47-4924-a5e8-92b748e7a08b).
seed_data_creation: No persistent data created. Feature flags toggled and restored to all-true by the final test_zz_restore_all_features case + post-frontend cleanup PUT. Verified test user ends iteration with links=true, cpi=true, all flags=true.
context_for_next_testing_agent: test_iteration12_feature_gating.py is parametrized across 12 features and uses a _do_request helper that supports POST_FORM for multipart endpoints (separate_data). Admin login uses /api/admin/login NOT /api/auth/login (this env's admin user isn't reachable via the standard auth endpoint). REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL = https://krexion-build-3.preview.emergentagent.com (review_request mentions a different 98e7b8f0 host — the frontend/.env value is the source of truth). NativeShell testids confirmed: native-shell-root, native-titlebar/menubar/sidebar/topbar/body/account-card/quick-new-job, native-nav-section-{main,engine,tools,cpi,system}, native-nav-<feature-slug>, native-icon-{cloud,bell,help,user}, native-usermenu-{settings,health,logout}, native-titlebar-{min,max,close}.
rca of the issue: n/a — this is a verification iteration for E1's NativeShell + feature-gating implementation. All review_request items 1-8 verified passing. Two minor backend observations logged (ua_generator GET endpoint not gated; pydantic 422 precedes feature check for some POSTs) — non-blocking, optional polish.
